testcase.name: test_agents

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 8 == 9 + where 8 = len([{'id': 'ceo', 'name': 'Aurora', 'role': 'CEO AI', 'department': 'Executive', ...}, {'id': 'marketing', 'name': 'Vega', 'role': 'Marketing AI', 'department': 'Marketing', ...}, {'id': 'sales', 'name': 'Atlas', 'role': 'Sales AI', 'department': 'Sales', ...}, {'id': 'research', 'name': 'Iris', 'role': 'Research AI', 'department': 'Research', ...}, {'id': 'developer', 'name': 'Nova', 'role': 'Developer AI', 'department': 'Engineering', ...}, {'id': 'operations', 'name': 'Orion', 'role': 'Operations AI', 'department': 'Operations', ...}, ...]) + where [{'id': 'ceo', 'name': 'Aurora', 'role': 'CEO AI', 'department': 'Executive', ...}, {'id': 'marketing', 'name': 'Vega', 'role': 'Marketing AI', 'department': 'Marketing', ...}, {'id': 'sales', 'name': 'Atlas', 'role': 'Sales AI', 'department': 'Sales', ...}, {'id': 'research', 'name': 'Iris', 'role': 'Research AI', 'department': 'Research', ...}, {'id': 'developer', 'name': 'Nova', 'role': 'Developer AI', 'department': 'Engineering', ...}, {'id': 'operations', 'name': 'Orion', 'role': 'Operations AI', 'department': 'Operations', ...}, ...] = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3.py:252: in test_agents assert len(r.json()) == 9 E AssertionError: assert 8 == 9 E + where 8 = len([{'id': 'ceo', 'name': 'Aurora', 'role': 'CEO AI', 'department': 'Executive', ...}, {'id': 'marketing', 'name': 'Vega', 'role': 'Marketing AI', 'department': 'Marketing', ...}, {'id': 'sales', 'name': 'Atlas', 'role': 'Sales AI', 'department': 'Sales', ...}, {'id': 'research', 'name': 'Iris', 'role': 'Research AI', 'department': 'Research', ...}, {'id': 'developer', 'name': 'Nova', 'role': 'Developer AI', 'department': 'Engineering', ...}, {'id': 'operations', 'name': 'Orion', 'role': 'Operations AI', 'department': 'Operations', ...}, ...]) E + where [{'id': 'ceo', 'name': 'Aurora', 'role': 'CEO AI', 'department': 'Executive', ...}, {'id': 'marketing', 'name': 'Vega', 'role': 'Marketing AI', 'department': 'Marketing', ...}, {'id': 'sales', 'name': 'Atlas', 'role': 'Sales AI', 'department': 'Sales', ...}, {'id': 'research', 'name': 'Iris', 'role': 'Research AI', 'department': 'Research', ...}, {'id': 'developer', 'name': 'Nova', 'role': 'Developer AI', 'department': 'Engineering', ...}, {'id': 'operations', 'name': 'Orion', 'role': 'Operations AI', 'department': 'Operations', ...}, ...] = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
